Source   Edit  

Core combat system types for EC4X

Pure data types for combat resolution. No I/O, no JSON - just game logic types.

Based on EC4X specifications Section 7.0 Combat

Helper procs for combat squadronsTask Force helpersCER Table lookup (Section 7.3.3)Target bucket classification (Section 7.3.2.2)

Imports

../../common/types/core, ../../common/types/units, ../../common/types/combat, ../../common/types/diplomacy, ../squadron, ../fleet

Types

AttackResult = object
  attackerId*: SquadronId
  targetId*: SquadronId
  cerRoll*: CERRoll
  damageDealt*: int
  targetStateBefore*: CombatState
  targetStateAfter*: CombatState
Source   Edit   
BattleContext = object
  systemId*: SystemId
  taskForces*: seq[TaskForce]
  seed*: int64
  maxRounds*: int
  allowAmbush*: bool
  allowStarbaseCombat*: bool
  preDetectedHouses*: seq[HouseId]
Source   Edit   
CERModifier {.pure.} = enum
  Scouts, Morale, Surprise, Ambush
Source   Edit   
CERRoll = object
  naturalRoll*: int
  modifiers*: int
  finalRoll*: int
  effectiveness*: float
  isCriticalHit*: bool
Result of rolling for Combat Effectiveness Rating Source   Edit   
CombatPhase {.pure.} = enum
  PreCombat, Ambush, Intercept, MainEngagement, PostCombat
Source   Edit   
CombatResult = object
  systemId*: SystemId
  rounds*: seq[seq[RoundResult]]
  survivors*: seq[TaskForce]
  retreated*: seq[HouseId]
  eliminated*: seq[HouseId]
  victor*: Option[HouseId]
  totalRounds*: int
  wasStalemate*: bool
Source   Edit   
CombatSquadron = object
  squadron*: Squadron
  state*: CombatState
  fleetStatus*: FleetStatus
  damageThisTurn*: int
  crippleRound*: int
  bucket*: TargetBucket
  targetWeight*: float
Source   Edit   
RetreatEvaluation = object
  taskForce*: HouseId
  wantsToRetreat*: bool
  effectiveROE*: int
  ourStrength*: int
  enemyStrength*: int
  strengthRatio*: float
  reason*: string
Source   Edit   
RoundResult = object
  phase*: CombatPhase
  roundNumber*: int
  attacks*: seq[AttackResult]
  stateChanges*: seq[StateChange]
Source   Edit   
StateChange = object
  squadronId*: SquadronId
  fromState*: CombatState
  toState*: CombatState
  destructionProtectionApplied*: bool
Source   Edit   
TargetBucket {.pure.} = enum
  Raider = 1, Capital = 2, Destroyer = 3, Fighter = 4, Starbase = 5 ## Squadron in combat context
                                                                    ## Note: CombatState is imported from common/types/combat.nim
Source   Edit   
TaskForce = object
  house*: HouseId
  squadrons*: seq[CombatSquadron]
  roe*: int
  isCloaked*: bool
  moraleModifier*: int
  scoutBonus*: bool
  isDefendingHomeworld*: bool
  eliLevel*: int
  clkLevel*: int
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc aliveSquadrons(tf: TaskForce): seq[CombatSquadron] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get all non-destroyed squadrons Source   Edit   
proc baseWeight(bucket: TargetBucket): float {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get base targeting weight for bucket (Section 7.3.2.2) Source   Edit   
proc calculateTargetWeight(cs: CombatSquadron): float {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Calculate weighted random selection weight Crippled units get 2x weight (Section 7.3.2.5) Source   Edit   
proc canBeTargeted(cs: CombatSquadron): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if squadron is valid target Source   Edit   
proc classifyBucket(sq: Squadron): TargetBucket {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Determine target priority bucket for squadron Source   Edit   
proc getCurrentAS(cs: CombatSquadron): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get current attack strength (reduced if crippled or reserve status) Per economy.md:3.9 - Reserve fleets have AS reduced by half Source   Edit   
proc getCurrentDS(cs: CombatSquadron): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get defense strength (doesn't change when crippled, but reduced if reserve) Per economy.md:3.9 - Reserve fleets have DS reduced by half Source   Edit   
proc isAlive(cs: CombatSquadron): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if squadron can still fight Source   Edit   
proc isCritical(naturalRoll: int): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if natural roll (before modifiers) is critical hit Natural 9 = critical hit (Section 7.3.3) Source   Edit   
proc isEliminated(tf: TaskForce): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if Task Force has no surviving squadrons Source   Edit   
proc lookupCER(modifiedRoll: int): float {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Convert modified die roll to effectiveness multiplier Based on CER Table from Section 7.3.3 Source   Edit   
proc totalAS(tf: TaskForce): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate total attack strength of Task Force Source   Edit  

Exports

HouseId, SystemId, FleetId, SquadronId, Squadron, EnhancedShip, ShipClass, CombatState, DiplomaticState, FleetStatus

Made with Nim. Generated: 1980-01-01 00:00:00 UTC
